description_long: This object is a modern firearm with a robust, angular frame and a matte metallic finish, featuring a prominent rail system along the top for mounting accessories. The grip is ergonomically shaped with a textured surface for secure handling, and the trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for finger placement. The magazine is detachable and shown removed, with two visible cartridges placed beside it, indicating a semi-automatic loading mechanism. The barrel is thick and solid, with venting or ribbing along the top, and the overall design is compact and tactical. The object lacks a traditional shotgun stock, instead featuring a pistol grip for one-handed operation. The visible details suggest a focus on durability and modern tactical use, with all components rendered in dark gray and black tones.
description: A compact, modern firearm with a metallic finish, pistol grip, and detachable magazine, featuring a robust rail system and ergonomic design. The object is primarily dark gray and black, with visible cartridges and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the firearm, the rail system, and the pistol grip, with the magazine partially removed.
description_view_1: Rear and top view highlighting the sight alignment, grip texture, and the open magazine well with cartridges beside it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, magazine, and cartridges, emphasizing the firearm's thickness and detailing.
description_view_3: Angled view from the rear, focusing on the grip, trigger guard, and the arrangement of the magazine and cartridges.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
